t_ch: 这…这确实是我替卡波特教授代笔完成的。
t_en: ...I—I did write this for Professor Capote.

t_ch: 你作为防卫科队长，本就和卡波特教授的工作领域交际甚少。可是为何突然替卡波特教授手写粉丝回馈卡呢？
t_en: You're head of the Security Department — you don't have anything to do with Professor Capote. Why did you suddenly start writing his reply cards for him, huh?

t_ch: 哼哼，真相还不急着现在揭穿！
t_en: Hmph, d—don't go spilling the beans just yet!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这份证据有点太拐弯抹角了，还有没有更直观的啊？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, this evidence is a bit of a stretch... Do we have anything better?

t_ch: 卡波特限定写真。
t_en: Capote's limited-edition snapshot.

t_ch: 这份限定写真就是证据！
t_en: This limited-edition snapshot!

t_ch: 这份写真是由卡波特粉丝后援会成员拍摄，拍摄时间不超过<unbreak>24</unbreak>小时。也就是说，你在今天之内，曾经找过卡波特教授！
t_en: This was taken by a member of the Master Capote Fan Club less than <unbreak>24</unbreak> hours ago. In other words, you went to find Professor Capote today...

t_ch: 而这个时间，恰好符合你失联的时间记录！
t_en: ...and stopped responding to messages in the same time window!

t_ch: 我…这个只是……
t_en: I... This is just...

t_ch: 不必急着为自己辩护，因为真相的揭露不是现在！
t_en: N—No need to launch your defense, we haven't got to the core yet!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这份证据有点太拐弯抹角了，还有没有更直观的啊？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, this evidence is a bit of a stretch... Do we have anything better?

t_ch: 波少百科<unbreak>12.0</unbreak>。
t_en: Master Capote's Life Wiki version <unbreak>12.0</unbreak>.

t_ch: 这是最关键的证据！
t_en: Master Capote's Life Wiki version <unbreak>12.0</unbreak>!

t_ch: 这份录音稿中记录了你向卡波特求助的内容，上面清楚记载着：强势上司、超过分内的工作等。
t_en: This transcript records what you asked Capote to help you with. Here we can see a bossy manager and you being asked to do things outside of your job description.

t_ch: 虽然卡波特教授不太了解我的语言习惯，模仿出来的状态和我略有差异…但是！这些具体的表达内容，证明了关键！
t_en: Clearly, Professor Capote is unlikely to master my speech or mannerisms any time soon... But the content is the key here!

t_ch: 我，就是你的压力来源！
t_en: I am the source of your pressure!

t_ch: 小姐…你们…怎么都来了？
t_en: Lady Asta, you... Why are you all here?

t_ch: 这个家伙我从没见过，看上去很像是遭受侵蚀之后变异的新个体。
t_en: I've never seen anything like this before. It looks like some kind of new entity — it must have mutated after being corroded.

t_ch: 小姐，我确实是…去找过卡波特教授。也确实向他请教了一些事情。
t_en: My lady, I did speak to Professor Capote, and I did ask him some things.

t_ch: 但是这都不是针对小姐的！我从来没有在和您相处的过程中，感受到压力……
t_en: But they had nothing to do with you! I've never experienced any pressure with you...

t_ch: 哎，阿兰。事到如今，你竟然还是不愿意接受我的道歉。
t_en: Oh Arlan, won't you accept my apology?

t_ch: 为了让你的侥幸心理破灭，我只能再次拿出关键证据了。
t_en: *sigh* I'll just have to show you more evidence.

t_ch: 我们不仅知道了你从心修行的核心，还调查到你曾委托了丹恒，想要完成从镜的修行。
t_en: We know the essence of your trial of the heart, and we also know that you asked Dan Heng to help you complete the trial of the mirror.

t_ch: 阿兰，我真的感觉很抱歉。在和丹恒交流之前，我都不知道你竟然背负着这么巨大的压力，独自负重前行。
t_en: I'm so sorry, Arlan. Until I spoke with Dan Heng, I never realized how much pressure was on your shoulders.

t_ch: 小姐，我真的没有……
t_en: Miss, I really don't...

t_ch: 不必多说！我自有证据。
t_en: Hold it! I have evidence...

t_ch: 破碎的天花板。
t_en: The broken ceiling tile.

t_ch: 就是这块天花板！
t_en: This ceiling tile!

t_ch: 这块…嗯…天花板！它…它被你打坏了！
t_en: This... um... ceiling tile! You... you broke it!

t_ch: 抱歉…我会之后修好它的。
t_en: Sorry... I'll get it fixed later.

t_ch: 平日里，你虽然不多言语，但绝不是性情暴戾的人。打坏天花板，足以见得你当时力道之大，侧面反映出你心中压力之巨，愤恨之深！
t_en: I know you can be tough, but you're not violent by nature, Arlan — quite the opposite! Breaking a ceiling tile like this shows how much pressure and anger you were carrying around!

t_ch: 这个说法怪怪的耶…你那里还有别的线索吗？
t_en: Uh, eh-he... This interpretation is sounding a little odd... Do we have any other evidence?

t_ch: 脚印。
t_en: The footprint.

t_ch: 这枚脚印就是证据。
t_en: This footprint!

t_ch: 这双鞋是我买给你的，尺寸和款式我都记得很清楚。所以这是你留下的脚印，不会有问题。
t_en: I bought these shoes for you — I remember the size and the design. This is undoubtedly your footprint.

t_ch: 但是背后的细节可以看出很多故事，比如…嗯…比如它一看就是很用力踩出来的！当时你肯定心里积攒了很多压力，才会这么使劲！
t_en: But I can tell a lot from the details, such as... umm... y—you used a lot of force! You had a lot of pressure, so you stomped really hard!

t_ch: 她都编不下去了，你那里应该有别的线索吧？
t_en: She can't even make things up anymore. You have more evidence, right?

t_ch: 阿兰ID的通行证。
t_en: Arlan's ID Pass.

t_ch: 这就是关键证据！
t_en: Your ID pass!

t_ch: 这，不是一张普通的空间站通行证。在它上面，贴着一张很关键的照片！
t_en: This isn't just any old station pass, is it? There's a very important photo on it!

t_ch: 那就是——佩佩的大头贴！
t_en: A photo of Peppy!

t_ch: 小姐，我很喜欢佩佩，所以才……
t_en: Lady Asta, I like Peppy a lot, so I...

t_ch: 不不不，阿兰，你不必为自己的行为找虚假的借口。当然，也不排除你已经彻底说服了自己，将自己都彻底欺骗。
t_en: No, no, Arlan. You don't need to find excuses for your actions. *sigh* Maybe you've actually convinced yourself...

t_ch: 结合之前你和卡波特模拟的内容，还有你工作周报中提到的：和佩佩一起玩电子飞盘投影……
t_en: The combination of your simulated conversations with Capote and the entry in your work log about playing holodisc with Peppy...

t_ch: 所有的证据都表明！我委托你陪佩佩一起玩，就是你最大的压力来源！
t_en: It points to one thing: Me getting you to look after Peppy is the greatest source of your stress!

t_ch: 你甚至将它的照片打印下来，时时刻刻警醒自己，不让自己松懈。
t_en: Y—You even printed out a photo of Peppy to constantly remind yourself to look after him! *sniff*

t_ch: 每次见到这张通行证，你肯定都在告诉自己：阿兰，你必须打起十二分的精神去和佩佩一起玩，因为这是艾丝妲站长的委托！如果在她面前犯了错…她肯定会狠狠惩罚我，折磨我的！
t_en: I know exactly what message you're trying to drill into yourself by sticking this photo onto your pass: "Arlan, taking Peppy out to play is an assignment from Lead Researcher Asta — you better throw that holodisc like it's a full-on discus! If you spare any effort... Lady Asta will find out and punish you terribly for all eternity!" *sniff*

t_ch: 我从来没有这样想过，小姐……
t_en: M—My lady, don't you think that's a long thought to think...?

t_ch: 小姐，我之所以进行这些挑战，从来都不是因为你的缘故。
t_en: Lady Asta, please, I didn't do any of these trials because of you.

t_ch: 你给我的任务，无论是不是工作范围内的，我都会去完成它。
t_en: I always try to complete every assignment you give me, regardless of whether it's within my job description.

t_ch: 尤其是和佩佩一起玩…我每次都很开心。
t_en: I... really like taking Peppy out to play.

t_ch: 艾丝妲，我也觉得阿兰似乎并不是对你有不满。
t_en: Asta, I don't think Arlan is upset with you.

t_ch: 可是阿兰周围，只有我一个上司。除了是我，还会是谁呢？他为了能够学习化解压力，甚至都去求助三月七小姐了呀！
t_en: But Arlan doesn't have any other bosses — who else would it be? March, he asked to accompany you so he could learn how to manage his stress, right?

t_ch: 啊？什么！原来阿兰来找我一起执行任务，是为了体验压力啊！
t_en: Huh? Arlan wanted to go on assignments just to experience stress!?

t_ch: 呼…幸好幸好，要是和阿兰一起去执行了任务，可能就没有那么大的压力了。
t_en: Phew... Good thing I let him go alone — my calming influence would've ruined his training.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，好像阴差阳错，做了最正确的决定呢。
t_en: Hehe, guess I made the right decision after all.

t_ch: 丹恒先生所言极是。
t_en: Dan Heng was right.

t_ch: 丹恒他说什么啦？是不是说我很会解决别人的困扰之类的？
t_en: What did he say? That I'm good at solving people's problems?

t_ch: 无论如何，今天必须要让阿兰感受到我反省的决心，并且接受我的道歉才行！
t_en: Ugh, Arlan, all I want you to understand is how sincerely I'm reflecting on my actions. Please accept my apology!

t_ch: 可是小姐……
t_en: But, my lady...

t_ch: 不要说了！
t_en: Stop!

t_ch: 阿兰，我其实真的能够感受到你的压力，尤其是在我看到这张照片之后，更加难过。
t_en: Arlan, I understood the level of stress you're dealing with as soon as I saw this photo.

t_ch: 阿兰毅然离去的背影。
t_en: Arlan's determined silhouette.

t_ch: 这不是我拍的照片嘛！
t_en: Didn't I take that photo?

t_ch: 我总是给你布置任务，分配委托，但其实我很少亲眼见证你奔赴战场的样子。
t_en: I'm always giving you tasks and assignments, but I never actually see how you take to the battlefield...

t_ch: 不论是这张照片，还是刚才你独自一人与敌人战斗的样子……
t_en: ...when I saw this photo, when I saw you fighting alone just now...

t_ch: 我都感觉很抱歉，是我带给了你这么多的压力。让你在本来就很繁重的工作之下，还要替我的个人私事忙碌。
t_en: I'm just sorry that I gave you the stress of all my private affairs on top of an already stressful job.

t_ch: 阿兰，真的对不起。
t_en: Please forgive me, Arlan.

t_ch: 小姐，虽然我很…很感动。但是……
t_en: My Lady, I... I'm very touched, but...

t_ch: 但其实我是因为黑塔女士，才开启了这段修行。
t_en: I started this trial because of Madam Herta.
What!?

t_ch: 以前每次黑塔女士回到空间站的时候，都会委托我去做一些…防卫科工作范围之外的工作。
t_en: Whenever she's back on the space station, Madam Herta assigns me things outside the Security Department remit.

t_ch: 我不会也不敢拒绝她…因为黑塔女士作为上司的压迫感，实在是太强了。
t_en: Even if I dared to refuse, I wouldn't know how. She's just... too overbearing.

t_ch: 不是当实验样本去体验她带来的新样品，就是寻找一些闻所未闻的古籍……
t_en: Whether it's helping her test some new specimen, or looking for ancient documents I've never even heard of...

t_ch: 放到以前做这些任务倒是没有问题，可是如今「反物质军团」入侵刚结束，还有许多余党残留在这里。我想将更多的时间和精力，放到清扫上面去……
t_en: ...Assignments like those were okay before the invasion, but now I need to focus on clearing out any last traces of the Legion.

t_ch: 哦！所以你是想提前练习，然后学会拒绝黑塔的委托对吧？
t_en: Aha! So, you're trying to learn how to reject Herta, and then put it into practice!

t_ch: 是的，我在清扫的过程中，发现了一本没有名字的手写笔记，里面记录了化解上级压力的<unbreak>36</unbreak>种方法，还专门有一部分写的是化解上级压力的修行。
t_en: Yes. I found an anonymous handwritten journal while I was cleaning up — it mentioned <unbreak>36</unbreak> different strategies for relieving pressure. That's where I read about the trials.

t_ch: 从心、从镜、从我……？
t_en: Of the heart, of the mirror, of the self...?

t_ch: 没错，笔记里还针对这些修行做了批注。于是我就想试试看……
t_en: Yes. There were detailed notes, so... I wanted to give them a try.

t_ch: 你的修行让艾丝妲担心极了。
t_en: Those trials really made Asta worry.

t_ch: 不要随便翻没有名字的笔记！
t_en: Don't just read any anonymous journal!

t_ch: 你还真是单纯…
t_en: Did you really think it would help...?

t_ch: 抱歉小姐…我不想麻烦更多的人协助我修行，所以才没有告诉你。
t_en: I'm sorry, my lady... I didn't want to bother anyone, so I didn't mention it.

t_ch: 所以…我并没有给你带来那些压力吗？
t_en: So... you don't feel pressured around me?

t_ch: 在小姐这里，我从来没有感觉到压力。
t_en: I've never felt pressured around you, my lady.

t_ch: 好啦好啦，误会解除。你们双方都应该反思反思才对啦！
t_en: Alright, alright — it's all a misunderstanding. You two should reflect on your actions!

t_ch: 你说是吧？{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Right, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 双方都应该多多沟通才对。
t_en: You need to talk to each other more.

t_ch: 没错没错，你看我们俩之间就不会有这样的误会啦。
t_en: Yeah! See, the two of us would never have misunderstandings like this.

t_ch: 双方都应该有话直说才对。
t_en: You both need to start saying what you're thinking.

t_ch: 没错没错，你看我有什么意见都是直接说哒。
t_en: Yup! I always say what I'm thinking.

t_ch: 双方都应该动动脑子才对。
t_en: You both need to use your brains more.

t_ch: 没错没…不对！你又想破坏这美好的气氛！
t_en: That's righ— Hey! This is supposed to be a happy moment!

t_ch: 总之，丹恒先生所言极是…
t_en: Anyways, Dan Heng was right...

t_ch: 你重复这句话好多次了，丹恒到底说了什么啊……
t_en: You keep saying that — what did Dan Heng even say...

t_ch: 总之…谢谢你们陪着小姐一起来找我。
t_en: ...Thank you for helping Lady Asta... and for coming to find me.

t_ch: 如果真的要答谢我们，就让佩佩和我们一起也玩一玩电子飞盘吧～
t_en: You're welcome! Although if you really wanna thank me... let me play holodisc with Peppy — pleaaaase~?

t_ch: 那些照片搞得科员人心惶惶。阿兰大哥，你说这事儿该咋办啊……
t_en: Those photos made every staff member anxious. Arlan, what should we do...

t_ch: 咋、咋办？要我说，照片上是啥东西都没弄清楚，就不该我们管！
t_en: Wh—What should we do? If it were up to me, we shouldn't do anything since we're not even sure what's shown in those photos.

t_ch: 行了！怪东西在空间站里难道还少么？跟科员们说，这件事我会亲自调查。
t_en: Enough! It's not like the station has never encountered strange phenomena before! Go tell the rest. I will lead this investigation myself.

t_ch: 大哥你这是何苦呢，要是像上次一样有个三长两短……
t_en: Why take on this all by yourself, Arlan? If anything happens like last time...

t_ch: 发生什么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 啊，是你。我们正在讨论空间站最近出现的诡影照片……
t_en: Oh, it's you. We're discussing the recent photos of specters circulating around the space station...

t_ch: 当真恐怖如斯。
t_en: Whoa, scary!

t_ch: 这还只是冰山一角呢。科员们拍到的照片可不止这几张！
t_en: That's just the tip of the iceberg. Other staff members have taken more photos of the same thing!

t_ch: …就这？
t_en: ...That's it?

t_ch: 呵呵，不愧是拯救空间站的英雄。胆子真大！
t_en: Huh. Of course, you are not scared easily. You're the BIG hero of the space station, after all.

t_ch: 似乎混进了奇怪的东西…
t_en: Looks like something weird got mixed into the batch.

t_ch: 啊这…是我一时疏忽，您就当没看见！
t_en: Oh, um... This is a simple oversight. Please just let this slide!

t_ch: 这段时间，防卫科收到了多份有关这种不明生物的目击情报。
t_en: Recently, the Security Department has received multiple sightings of this unidentified creature.

t_ch: 它行踪诡秘，仿若幽灵，只有照片能定格它的形状——或许跟某种奇物有什么关联。
t_en: It moves around stealthily like a ghost, and only a photograph can reveal its shape — it may have a connection to a certain Curio.

t_ch: 研究部门忙于重建，一时间也抽不出人手来调查……
t_en: Too busy with the station's reconstruction, none of the research labs have any more personnel to spare for this investigation.

t_ch: 什么忙得很，都是托词！推诿扯皮！我呸！
t_en: Hmph, they always claim they are busy all the time! All excuses! Ptui!

t_ch: 就、就是。阿兰大哥，这吓人的皮球你可接不得啊！
t_en: Th—That's right. Arlan, you really shouldn't take this on all by yourself!

t_ch: 行了，麻烦总得有人去解决。
t_en: Well, someone has to.

t_ch: 别人踢来的皮球，正面接下就好。我们也踢回去，岂不是承认自己跟他们一个水平？
t_en: When the ball is in our court, we should just take it. If we kick the ball back into the other court, that just means we've lowered ourselves to their level, wouldn't you say?

t_ch: 你真傻，真的。
t_en: You're silly, truly.

t_ch: …大小姐…不，艾丝妲站长也常这么说。
t_en: Miss... Um... the Lead Researcher Asta says this a lot too.

t_ch: 小心惹得一身臊。
t_en: Careful what you ask for.

t_ch: 我知道，但害怕麻烦，怎么干防卫科的工作？
t_en: I know, but how would I be able to work security if I'm afraid of trouble?

t_ch: 大哥，我得提醒你一句，防卫科日常排险事务都满了，抽不出多余的人手。
t_en: I should remind you that everyone in the Security Department already has their hands full with routine danger elimination tasks. We simply don't have the people.

t_ch: 对…对！我手头也还、还有很多活呢！比如那个，还有那个……
t_en: Th—That's right! I still have so much work to do! Like that one, and that one...

t_ch: 哈…好吧。{NICKNAME}，你不会拒绝一个伤患的请求吧？事出紧急，我需要你的协助。
t_en: Ah... Alright. {NICKNAME}, you wouldn't refuse the request from a recovering patient, would you? This is an emergency, so I do need your help.

t_ch: 我已经派人通知诡影的目击者去基座舱段的<color=#dbc291ff>接待大厅</color>集合了。你我先去探探口风，再做具体打算。
t_en: I already sent for people to gather all the witnesses of the specters at the <color=#dbc291ff>reception hall</color> in the base zone. Let's go and interview them before coming up with a plan.

t_ch: 你你你、你是没看到那东西有多恐怖……
t_en: Youyouyouyou... you didn't see just how scary that thing is...

t_ch: 呵，有多恐怖？我可一点不害怕。要是让我撞见，碰个瓷，刚好还能逃了最近的课题。
t_en: Huh? How scary can it be? I'm not afraid, not even a little bit. If I ever ran into it, I'd play it up a little. I might even be able to use the encounter as an excuse to escape from work.

t_ch: 你太天真了…我已经打听到，那东西可以占据人的躯壳，令人沦为行尸走肉…到时候别说课题了，你连命都没了……
t_en: You're too naive... I heard that thing can take over one's physical body and turn its victims into mindless zombies... By that point, never even mind the research. Your life would be gone...

t_ch: 你别仗着我是应物科的忽悠我啊。这等厉害的银河生物，在「黑塔」周遭早绝迹了。除非…除非是你们界种科的奇物跑了！
t_en: Don't try to spook me just because I'm from the Department of Implement Arts. A cosmic entity as strong as this around the space station would already have been wiped out. Unless... unless it's one of your Curios at the Department of Ecology!

t_ch: 我、我可没说啊，我什么都不知道，你别乱讲……
t_en: I—I didn't say anything like that. I knew nothing, so don't you go around blabbering...

t_ch: 对，想起来了，我放风打千儿时曾经随手翻过一本《星域界种指要》，上面记录了界种科某个名为「戏命鬼」的奇物信息……
t_en: Oh, now I remember. A while ago, when I was on a break, I came across a book named Species of the Galaxy, which does have a Curio entry called the Jinx...

t_ch: 戏命鬼…鬼……
t_en: J—J—J—Jinx...

t_ch: 戏命鬼…鬼…
t_en: J—J—J—Jinx...

t_ch: 有奇物跑了？
t_en: There's a runaway Curio?

t_ch: 啊啊啊啊，鬼啊！
t_en: Aaaah! It appears!

t_ch: 别叫啦！耳膜都要被你叫穿了。看清楚，是阿兰大人和拯救了空间站的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Stop yelling, my eardrums are gonna burst! Look carefully, it's Captain Arlan and {NICKNAME}, who saved the space station.

t_ch: 呜呜…对不起，我失态了……
t_en: *sniffle* ...Sorry, I lost my composure...

t_ch: 别害怕，亚伯拉罕。诡影目前尚未造成实质性伤害，防卫科也已针对此事展开了调查。
t_en: Don't be afraid, Abraham. The specter has yet to cause any substantial damage, and the Security Department has already begun an investigation.

t_ch: 希望你们把知道的都说出来，协助防卫科早点侦破此事。
t_en: I hope you can tell us everything you know and help us crack the case as soon as possible.

t_ch: 我啊？我知道的也很有限，不过是从亚伯拉罕那里听来的一点风言风语，以及一本书上看来的知识。
t_en: Me? I don't know much for sure. All I know is the rumors heard from Abraham and some trivia I learnt from a book.

t_ch: 我怀疑…照片中那神出鬼没的东西，是界种科的奇物「戏命鬼」。
t_en: My guess is that... the ghastly thing captured in the photos is Jinx, a Curio from the Department of Ecology.

t_ch: 但我从来没听说过这种奇物……
t_en: I've never heard of a Curio called that...

t_ch: 那是你学艺不精罢了，连我都知道！
t_en: That's because you don't read. Even I know about it!

t_ch: 好了好了，别吵了…「戏命鬼」，这个名字我记下了。
t_en: Alright, stop bickering... Jinx, I'll note the name down.

t_ch: 还有什么线索吗？
t_en: Anything else?

t_ch: 没了。啧，谁有精力天天关注这些鬼神之谈。多关注自己吃了几碗饭不好吗？
t_en: Nope. Tsk, who in their right mind would focus so much on these talks of spirits and ghosts? Can't we just focus on our sustenance intake instead?

t_ch: 还有其他线人吗？
t_en: Any other witnesses?

t_ch: 那、那个，法政科的卢卡奇也许会知道些什么，那家伙比界种科的人还熟悉空间站的生物……
t_en: Th—That Lukacs from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics may know something. He is more familiar with creatures around the space station than the staff from the Department of Ecology...

t_ch: 卢卡奇？哦，我知道是谁了。
t_en: Lukacs? Ah, I know who he is.

t_ch: 谢谢你们二位的配合！如果遇到危险，记得及时向防卫科求助。
t_en: Thank you for your assistance! If you run into danger, remember to ask for help from the Security Department in time.

t_ch: 慢走不送呵。
t_en: Kay, bye.

t_ch: 好、好的，阿兰大人……
t_en: O—Okay, Captain Arlan...

t_ch: 那帮小家伙，也不知道躲好点，接二连三被拍到，搞得现在风声这么紧。
t_en: Those pesky things just don't know how to hide themselves. They kept getting photographed one after another. And now, everyone's looking out for them.

t_ch: 要是被抓到了，凭我这三寸不烂之舌，也很难帮他们开脱。保护奇物生命权益的大业，真是时时充满了变数啊……
t_en: If they were caught, even with my gift of the gab, there's only so much I can do for them. Life of protecting Curios' rights is just filled with twists...

t_ch: 想打听照片上的诡影…
t_en: I want to learn about those photoed spectral things...

t_ch: 照片上的诡影？那、那是什么？从来没听说过，你们怕不是找错人了。
t_en: Photoed spectral things? Wh—What are those? I've never heard of it. I think you got the wrong person.

t_ch: 在下正义之士卢卡奇，自从成为科员以来，一直在为空间站的非人生物合理权益四处奔走。
t_en: I am Lukacs the justice fighter, and I have been fighting for the rights of non-human creatures on the space station ever since I became a researcher here.

t_ch: 正义凛然如我，提到神出鬼行、捕风捉影这类歪邪之气，那是一概不知！
t_en: A man, as righteous as I am, has no knowledge of any activities regarding nefarious spirits and their related photographic activities!

t_ch: 谁被抓到？为谁开脱？
t_en: Who was caught? Who's them?

t_ch: 没、没什么！在下正义之士卢卡奇，正在为空间站的非人生物合理权益四处奔走！
t_en: N—Nothing! I am Lukacs the justice fighter, and I am fighting for the rights of non-human creatures on the space station!

t_ch: 一部分生物型藏品常年被关在暗无天日的收容舱内，这种暴行令人发指。听说在军团入侵期间，它们中的一部分趁乱出逃。
t_en: Some living collection entries have been locked inside lightless, isolated containment chambers. This act of cruelty is deplorable. I have heard that some of them were able to escape containment during the Legion invasion.

t_ch: 老实说，我卢卡奇第一个拍手称快！希望它们不要被抓回去，再受囚禁之苦。
t_en: Honestly, I am overjoyed with this development! I hope they won't get recaptured and returned to a fate of imprisonment.

t_ch: 听说诡影也是一种奇物…
t_en: Some said that the specters are also a type of Curio.

t_ch: 是、是吗…虽然很有道理，但你们这么说有什么根据吗？
t_en: I—Is that true? That makes sense, but do you have any evidence that this is the case?

t_ch: 直觉告诉我你知道内情。
t_en: My guts tell me that you know the inside story.

t_ch: 是、是吗…直觉这种东西能有几分可信度？我、我简直冤枉啊。
t_en: I—Is that so? How reliable can one's gut feelings be? I—I am being framed!

t_ch: 好吧，看在你们不是奇物再收容小队成员的份上，告诉你们也无妨。毕竟我不能为了它们的自由，牺牲大局的利益……
t_en: Alright, seeing that you're not from the Curio Collection Squad, I guess it wouldn't hurt to tell you. After all, I can't sacrifice the safety of the masses and ignore the bigger picture just for the freedom of the few.

t_ch: 我确实对那奇物的行踪略知一二。它的学名叫做「呜呜伯」，是界种科收容的星灵。
t_en: I do know a little about the Curios. They're scientifically called Wubbaboo, a species of Astral Spirits collected by the Department of Ecology.

t_ch: 它们在军团入侵期间逃跑了。哎，本来好好躲着，也就和大伙相安无事……
t_en: They managed to escape during the Legion invasion. Honestly, if they just went into hiding, there would've been no trouble for the rest of the space station...

t_ch: 偏偏最近大肆出没，三两结群，赫然有抢夺生存空间，密谋不义之事的倾向！
t_en: However, recently, they've been appearing in groups very frequently. It's as if they were plotting to take up more living space and stir up an uprising!

t_ch: 我思前想后，终于得出结论，这次情况特殊，与「黑塔」整体利益相悖，正义之士卢卡奇绝不能再为虎作伥，包庇它们的行踪！
t_en: After giving it much thought, I came to the conclusion that this is a special scenario that goes against the overall interests of Herta Space Station. Lukacs, the justice fighter, will no longer be aiding and abetting them and covering their tracks!

t_ch: 你认为它们没安好心？
t_en: You think they're up to no good?

t_ch: 十分有可能！
t_en: It is entirely possible!

t_ch: 你们是不知道，那「呜呜伯」出了名的喜欢戏弄人心，所以民间绰号才会叫做「戏命鬼」。
t_en: You don't know, the Wubbaboos are infamous for their manipulation tactics, so they have been nicknamed Jinx.

t_ch: 要是被它们摸清空间站生态，洞悉科员弱点，指不定会干出什么堪比「反物质军团」入侵的坏事。
t_en: If they were to gain crucial intel on the ecology of the space station and figure out the researchers' weaknesses, it's quite plausible that they may even wreak havoc on a scale that could rival the Antimatter Legion's invasion.

t_ch: 不愧是正义之士卢卡奇！
t_en: You really are a fighter for justice, Lukacs!

t_ch: 过奖了过奖了，法政科风气如此，我也不过是发扬应有的品格。
t_en: You are flattering me. This is just how we do things in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and I'm merely doing my part.

t_ch: 而且「呜呜伯」是出了名的喜欢戏弄人心，所以民间绰号才会叫做「戏命鬼」。
t_en: More importantly, the Wubbaboos are infamous for their manipulation tactics, which is why they have been nicknamed Jinx.

t_ch: 我如果不及时制止，只怕它们会干出什么堪比「反物质军团」入侵的坏事。
t_en: If I don't stop them in time, they may even wreak havoc on a scale that could rival the Antimatter Legion's invasion.

t_ch: 欸，你是防卫科的阿兰大人吧？偷偷告诉你们，「呜呜伯」行踪诡秘，成人闻之色变，唯恐避之不及。
t_en: Hey, aren't you that Captain Arlan from the Security Department? Let me tell you something in confidence. Wubbaboos are sneaky and mysterious. Even fully-grown humans are scared of them, which is why people will try their best to avoid any encounters.

t_ch: 但它们一向与幼童磁场相投，关系尤其密切。
t_en: However, they somehow have a connection with children and often share a close bond.

t_ch: 想知道更多的信息，就去问问那边的两个小孩吧。
t_en: If you want to know more, you can go ask the two little kids over there.

t_ch: 唉，放在平时，我卢卡奇绝不会出卖非人生物的权益。这次情况特殊，小机器人们一定会体谅我的……
t_en: *sigh* Usually, I wouldn't even think about infringing the rights of non-human creatures. However, this is a special situation. Hopefully the little robots will understand me...

t_ch: 看起来，那边的大人是有备而来。你要向我保证，一会不能说漏嘴，知道吗？
t_en: Looks like the adults over there are very prepared. You have to promise me you won't accidentally spill anything, okay?

t_ch: 我知道啦，包在我的身上。
t_en: I know, just leave it to me.

t_ch: 不论他们表现得多么正气凛然，多么威逼利诱，多么可怜兮兮，也不能说漏嘴！
t_en: No matter how righteous they appear, how charismatic they are, how pitiable they present themselves, we must not tell them anything!

t_ch: 知道啦知道啦，阿德勒你真是啰啰嗦嗦的。
t_en: Got it, got it. You can be such a nag sometimes, you know, Adler.

t_ch: 好，我不说你了…他们来了！噤声。
t_en: Okay, I'll stop... Here they come, shush!

t_ch: 啊，是阿兰大哥！
t_en: Oh, it's big brother Arlan!

t_ch: 自从怪物跑到这里来之后，阿兰大哥一直很忙，好久没有一起玩了…世玲一直很想你呢。
t_en: Ever since the monsters came here, big brother Arlan has been so busy that he never came around anymore... Shiling misses you so much.

t_ch: 阿兰大哥也很想你。
t_en: Big brother Arlan misses you too.

t_ch: 啊，我？我……
t_en: Uh, me? I...

t_ch: 咳，{NICKNAME}说得对。我一直都想着各位科员的安危。
t_en: Ahem, {NICKNAME} is right. I'm always thinking about the safety of the staff members.

t_ch: 正因如此，最近不少科员都拍到了诡异的照片，我想向你打听些消息。
t_en: And because of that, I would like to ask you about this rumor of staff members accidentally taking pictures of some eerie entities.

t_ch: 老实点，有话问你。
t_en: Be honest. We demand answers.

t_ch: 你是谁啊，干嘛一上来就凶巴巴的……
t_en: Who do you think you are? Why are you so mean...

t_ch: 世玲，{NICKNAME}没有要凶你的意思，我们来只是想向你打听些消息。
t_en: Shiling, I'm sure {NICKNAME} didn't mean to be rude to you. We are just here asking some questions.

t_ch: 你听说过最近不少科员都拍到了诡异的照片吗？
t_en: Have you heard about the mysterious entities showing up in many researchers' pictures?

t_ch: 照片我都拿来了，就是这几张。
t_en: I brought some of them here. Take a look.

t_ch: …我看到了。
t_en: ...I've seen them.

t_ch: 如果阿兰大哥是来打听「呜呜」的，恕世玲无可奉告！
t_en: If big brother Arlan is here to ask about Wubbie, Shiling has nothing to tell you. Sorry!

t_ch: 「呜呜」？
t_en: Wubbie?
Mmm!?

t_ch: 才开始就说漏嘴了，唉……
t_en: Spilling the beans right from the start... *sigh*

t_ch: 你已经说漏嘴了。
t_en: Ha, you've let the cat out of the bag.
Mmm!?

t_ch: 一紧张就把心里想的说出来了，对不起啊小阿德勒……
t_en: I am so sorry Adler. I let my nerves get the better of me...

t_ch: 唉，从一开始嘱咐你的时候我就猜到了……
t_en: *sigh* I knew it from the moment I told you...

t_ch: 没办法了。两位大人，我是界种科的小阿德勒，你们之前也许不曾见过我。
t_en: Ugh, never mind... I am Adler from the Department of Ecology. You may not have seen me before.

t_ch: 但如果你们曾经听说过空间站通行的「阿德勒分级法」…那便是冠以家父与我之姓。
t_en: But if you've heard of the Adler's Tier System used station-wide, you would have known the surname my father and I bear.

t_ch: 不论是你们口中的诡影，还是世玲方才所说「呜呜」，都是我们界种科的奇物「呜呜伯」。
t_en: Shiling's "Wubbie" is indeed one of the specters you mentioned. They are the Curio Wubbaboo from the Department of Ecology.

t_ch: 「呜呜伯」是星灵亚种，以灵体形式存在，在民间又有「戏命鬼」的谑称。如果二位对它好奇，也许我可以讲解一二。
t_en: Wubbaboos are considered a subspecies of Astral Spirits that exist in the form of spiritual entities. They are also known as Jinx to some people. If you are curious about them, I may be able to give you a brief explanation of their existence.

t_ch: 是的是的。小阿德勒可是界种科的天才呢，没有科员可出其左。
t_en: Yeah, yeah, that's right. Little Adler is our genius in the Department of Ecology. No one else can outsmart Adler.

t_ch: 是可出其右。教你很多遍了，心脏在的地方才是左边。
t_en: You mean outachieve. I told you many times, outsmart is about cunning. I am all about work and intellect.

t_ch: 好，小阿德勒，你别紧张。既然你们提到了「呜呜伯」，我和这位{NICKNAME}，只想问你几个问题……
t_en: Alright, little Adler, don't be anxious. Since you brought up Wubbaboo, {NICKNAME} and I here want to ask you a few questions...

t_ch: 「呜呜伯」是否有害？
t_en: Are Wubbaboos dangerous?

t_ch: 这个问题很难界定。
t_en: That's one hard question to answer.

t_ch: 「呜呜伯」和人类不同，在它们的逻辑里，没有「为害」的主观意识。
t_en: You see, Wubbaboos are different from humans. In their way of thinking, there is no active concept of malevolence.

t_ch: 但是它们遵循本能的无常行动，有时会造成无法意料的破坏，在人类的解读中又可以称之为「有害」。
t_en: However, the chaotic behaviors they exhibit in line with their nature often cause unpredictable damage to their surroundings, which can be perceived by humans as being harmful.

t_ch: 哪里可以找到「呜呜伯」？
t_en: Where can we find the Wubbaboos?

t_ch: 这个问题很难回答。
t_en: This question is difficult to answer.

t_ch: 我是通识型学者，并非课题型专家。
t_en: I am a generalist type of scholar, not a specialist.

t_ch: 从照片上来看，「呜呜伯」出没于各处，它们行动的具体路径，恐怕只有专门照拂它们的研究员才会知道。
t_en: Just based on these photos, Wubbaboos can appear anywhere and everywhere. Likely, the specific pathways of their movement can only be discerned by those who take care of them.

t_ch: 你好像在隐瞒些什么。
t_en: You seem to be hiding something.

t_ch: 并没有。作为界种科行走的「百科全书」，我只是在代替温世玲回答你们的问题。
t_en: I am NOT. As the walking encyclopedia in the Department of Ecology, I'm just answering your questions on behalf of Wen Shiling.

t_ch: 嗯，因为我刚刚说漏了嘴，阿德勒在帮我打圆场呢。
t_en: That's right. I messed up just now, so Adler is now helping me not tell on myself any more than I already did.

t_ch: 阿德勒，在我看来，你刚刚的回答避重就轻，模棱两可，提供的帮助实在有限。
t_en: Adler, in my professional opinion, your answers were vague, evasive, and only offered VERY limited help.

t_ch: 现在照片上的诡影，也就是「呜呜伯」，已经干扰了空间站的正常秩序。我必须加急回收它们，以防它们破坏空间站，加害科员。
t_en: The specters in the photos, the Wubbaboos, have already disrupted order on the space station. I need to recover them as soon as possible to prevent them from further endangering the space station and bringing potential harm to our staff.

t_ch: 不可能。我说过了，它们不会害人，只会遵从恣意妄为的简单本能。
t_en: Impossible. As I have said, they are not malicious. They only act in accordance with their most basic instincts.

t_ch: 没错没错，我们和呜呜熟得很，它们绝对不会故意害人，充其量只会到处捣蛋……
t_en: That's right, that's right! We're very familiar with Wubbie! They won't harm people on purpose. At most, they just pull some pranks at places...

t_ch: 世玲！我求求你别再说话了。
t_en: Shiling! Please, just stop talking.

t_ch: 它们的危害等级，防卫科自有判断，但首先，我需要找到一只「呜呜伯」做验证……
t_en: The level of danger they pose will be determined by the Security Department. But first, I need to find a Wubbaboo just to see for myself...

t_ch: 多找两只不嫌多。
t_en: Check a few more just to be sure. The more the merrier.

t_ch: 还是别这么冒进了……
t_en: Let's not rush ourselves...

t_ch: 说不定是最高级。
t_en: For all we know, Wubbaboos could be extremely dangerous.

t_ch: 才、才不是呢！
t_en: Th—They're not!

t_ch: 我完全理解你的打算，阿兰大人。可我们的确不知道「呜呜伯」的具体行踪。
t_en: I do fully understand where you are coming from, Captain Arlan. But we really don't know where the Wubbaboos are.

t_ch: 毕竟我们还是孩子，胆子可是很小的，害怕与这类诡秘的生灵打交道。你说是不是，世玲？
t_en: After all, we're just scared little kids. We're too timid to deal with mysterious entities like these, aren't we, Shiling?

t_ch: 啊，哦，是的！我、我们的确不知道……
t_en: Um... Oh, yes, that's right! I... um... we really don't know...

t_ch: 还请两位去其他地方寻觅「呜呜伯」踪迹吧。
t_en: Please leave us be and go search for the Wubbaboos elsewhere.

t_ch: 嗯嗯，都听阿德勒的，你们加油喔。
t_en: Um hum, Adler is right! You guys should totally go ahead and do as Adler says!

t_ch: 听温世玲的口风，总觉得阿德勒知道些内情。
t_en: Judging from Wen Shiling's answer, I have a feeling that Adler knows more than he's letting on.

t_ch: 她中间还说，跟「呜呜伯」熟得很…这两孩子，胆子可真够大的。
t_en: She even said they're very familiar with the Wubbaboos. These two kids are too brave for their own good.

t_ch: 既然如此，盯好阿德勒，也许会获得线索——他已经开始行动了。
t_en: In that case, let's keep our eyes on Adler. We might be able to gain some clues— He's already gone.

t_ch: 跟上去看看。
t_en: Let's follow them.

t_ch: 呜。
t_en: Woo.

t_ch: 都搜集齐了吗？你要的东西，我也帮你带来了。
t_en: Is everything here? I brought all the things you need too.

t_ch: 把事情办完，就快点回去。不要再多生事端，你们已经引起了防卫科的注意……
t_en: After completing your tasks, go back quickly. You already got the attention of the Security Department, so please stop trying to make more problems.

t_ch: 呜，呜呜！
t_en: Woo, woo-whoo!

t_ch: 你露出这么恐怖的表情也没用啊。阿兰大人是防卫科长，和他一起来的是帮助空间站抵御「军团」的英雄……
t_en: It just won't work, even if you put on a terrifying look like that. Captain Arlan is the head of the Security Department. And he is also with the hero who helped thwart the Legion's invasion of the space station...

t_ch: 他们两个加起来，就算是你们中间最大的那只，恐怕也是很难抵挡。
t_en: With those two together, even the biggest one among you is no match for them.

t_ch: 呜呜……
t_en: Woooo...

t_ch: 总之把东西拿上，你快走吧。
t_en: Anyway, take the stuff and leave, quickly.

t_ch: 站住！你们已经被包围了。
t_en: Freeze! We've got you surrounded.

t_ch: 它们要的东西，是一位名叫「荣仓终」的科员的所有物。
t_en: The things they want are the belongings of a certain researcher named Eikura Shuu.

t_ch: 也不知道这位「荣仓终」怎么得罪它们了。
t_en: I don't know how this Eikura Shuu got onto their bad side.

t_ch: （这只呜呜伯不再言语。）
t_en: (The Wubbaboo stops responding.)

t_ch: （虽然表情好勇斗狠，但它还是透露出了隐约的忧伤。）
t_en: (Despite its best efforts to put on an expression of fierceness and bravery, yet a hint of its sadness nevertheless seeped out.)

t_ch: 呜呜，呜呜呜呜！
t_en: Woo-woo, woo whoooo woo!

t_ch: …听不懂。算了，接下来的交给我们就好。事不宜迟，收拾「军团」余孽，夺回科员的所有物！
t_en: ...Um, I don't understand what it's trying to say. Never mind, just leave the rest to us. There's no time to lose. We are purging Legion remnants and recovering researchers' belongings now!

t_ch: 我有种不祥的预感，{NICKNAME}，小心为上。
t_en: I have a bad feeling about this, {NICKNAME}. Just be careful.

t_ch: 好大的呜呜伯！界种科竟然收容过这么巨大的奇物……
t_en: What a huge Wubbaboo! The Department of Ecology managed to contain a Curio this size!?

t_ch: 和之前的比起来…好像也没什么区别？
t_en: It doesn't look very different from the one from before...?

t_ch: …所以它只是长得比别个都大是吗……
t_en: ...So it's only larger in size than the other ones?

t_ch: 趁我们战斗的当口，呜呜伯都消失了。
t_en: While we were battling, the Wubbaboos disappeared.

t_ch: 现在回去向那只落单的呜呜伯表明诚意，直接询问据点所在吧。
t_en: Let's go back to the lone Wubbaboo, show our sincerity, and ask about their base.

t_ch: 呜。
t_en: Woo.

t_ch: 这就是恐怖的「呜呜伯」？
t_en: So... That's the scary Wubbaboo?

t_ch: 啊，你们两个大人真是不害臊，竟然跟踪我。
t_en: Gah! Both of you adults are so shameless, going out of your way to stalk a kid like me.

t_ch: 就跟踪你了。
t_en: That's right, we did.

t_ch: 哼，也怪我自己没有多长个心眼。
t_en: Huff, I should've been more careful.

t_ch: 这叫做智取。
t_en: This is me outsmarting you.

t_ch: 哼，大人也就是嘴巴上会给自己的行为找补罢了。
t_en: Hmph, you adults are only good at one thing, making up excuses for your own actions.

t_ch: 阿德勒，你和这只呜呜伯刚刚在密谋什么？现在告诉我，我可以不追究你的责任。
t_en: Adler, what are you and the Wubbaboo conspiring to do? Tell me now, and I promise I won't hold you responsible.

t_ch: 你们在密谋什么？
t_en: What are you plotting?

t_ch: 没有密谋，我是在自言自语。你们有听到这只呜呜伯说一句话吗？
t_en: There's no conspiracy. I was just mumbling to myself. Did you hear the Wubbaboo talking?

t_ch: 它不会说人话，也不需要，因为你听得懂——界种科的小阿德勒精通不同生物种属的语言，我们知道——
t_en: It does not speak human languages, and it has no need to because you can understand it — The little Adler from the Department of Ecology is a master of languages of different species. We are very much aware of that...

t_ch: 如果你不承认，我只好去找界种科的负责人了……
t_en: If you insist on being tight-lipped about this, I will have to find the director of the Department of Ecology...

t_ch: 啊！千万别告诉辛克尔姨母！我…我说就是了。
t_en: Ugh! Please don't tell Auntie Hinkel about this! I... I'll tell you everything.

t_ch: 呜呜伯逃窜后，与空间站度过了很长一段相安无事的时光。我们也经常在一起玩耍。
t_en: After the Wubbaboos escaped, they stayed low-profile in the space station for a long time. And we played together a lot.

t_ch: 但是最近，它们突然集体出动，好像是因为某个共同目标…就连它，我最要好的朋友，也拜托我寻找东西——全跟某位科员相关。
t_en: However, recently, they have been mobilizing en masse for a certain collective aim... Even this one, my best friend, wanted me to find some things for them — all of which seem to have a connection with a certain researcher.

t_ch: 虽然我也不知道这是为什么，但它们肯定没有蓄意害人。
t_en: I don't know what this is for, but they certainly don't mean to hurt anyone.

t_ch: 我之所以不告诉你们，是因为…空间站到处都是埋首工作的大人，好不容易有了玩伴，我不希望它们因为莫须有的罪名而被回收。
t_en: I didn't tell anyone because... because everyone in the space station is an adult working on their own research projects. It's so hard to find a playmate, and I don't want them to be recovered just because of some baseless accusations.

t_ch: 没想到你也有孩子气的一面。
t_en: I never expected that you had this childlike side to you.

t_ch: 是啊，阿德勒一直都像大人一样稳重，本还让我有些担心。
t_en: Um hum, Adler has always acted like an adult. And I was a bit concerned at some point.

t_ch: 罪名是否成立要由阿兰判断。
t_en: Arlan, you should decide whether this should be considered a crime.

t_ch: 呃，{NICKNAME}…你这样让我压力很大。
t_en: Um, {NICKNAME}... That's one big responsibility you just dumped on me.

t_ch: 嗯…按你所说，呜呜伯集体行动的原因在于某种「共同目标」，我想，这就是防卫科现下调查的关键。
t_en: So, as you've already established, the Wubbaboos are mobilizing to work toward "a certain objective," which, I believe, will be the new focus of the Security Department's investigation for now.

t_ch: 呜。
t_en: Woo.

t_ch: 它好像说了什么？
t_en: Did it say something?

t_ch: 它说，它是不会说出那个目标的。
t_en: It says, "I will never reveal our goal."

t_ch: 它还劝你们不要多管闲事，否则它们中最可怖的那一个，早晚会来找你们的麻烦！
t_en: It also said, "Mind your own business or the Scariest of Us All will eventually come and make your lives difficult!"

t_ch: 它竟说了这么多吗…
t_en: It said that much with just one sound...?

t_ch: 嗯，我保证我都是如实翻译的。
t_en: Mhm. You can rest assured that I translated it faithfully.

t_ch: 要不别多管闲事了？
t_en: Maybe now we should just stay out of this?

t_ch: 嗯，它现在选择非暴力不合作，你们也拿它没办法嘛。
t_en: Mm, now that it refuses to cooperate, there isn't a thing you can do about it.

t_ch: 小家伙的威胁没用！
t_en: That thing's threat means nothing to us!

t_ch: 话虽如此，但它现在选择非暴力不合作，你们也拿它没办法嘛。
t_en: Even so, now that it refuses to cooperate, there isn't a thing you can do about it.

t_ch: 嘶，局面僵持住了啊。
t_en: Tsk, looks like we're stuck in a stalemate.

t_ch: 那如果这样的话，我就只能退而求其次，把这只呜呜伯先抓回去交差了……
t_en: If that's the case, my only option is to make a concession by arresting this one for an internal report...

t_ch: 呜！
t_en: Woo!

t_ch: 等一下，除非！它说除非……
t_en: Wait, unless! It says, "If..."

t_ch: 除非你们能证明自己的善意，它可以考虑把据点所在位置告诉你们。
t_en: "If you can prove that your intentions are benevolent, I will consider telling you the location of our base."

t_ch: 还挺会谈条件。那么我们要如何才能证明自己的善意？
t_en: It can negotiate, too? So how do we prove our intentions are benevolent then?

t_ch: 之前提到，它们正在收集一位名为「荣仓终」的科员所有物。
t_en: As I've mentioned before, they were trying to collect the belongings of a certain researcher named Eikura Shuu.

t_ch: 那位科员的东西全被「军团」怪物抢走了，无论是我，还是其它呜呜伯，先前都费了好大的功夫。
t_en: That researcher's belongings have all been taken away by Legion monsters. All the other Wubbaboos and I have been spending a huge amount of time and effort on retrieving the taken items.

t_ch: 这也是为什么它们总被拍到，难缠的对手耗尽了它们用于隐蔽自身的精力。
t_en: That's why they kept getting photographed. They were so occupied with dealing with difficult opponents that they had no spare energy left to stealth themselves.

t_ch: 如果你们能帮上忙，那就是自己人。否则，要消息没有，要呜命一条——它说完了。
t_en: If you can help them out, then you're a friend. Otherwise, it still won't tell you a single word, even if you threaten to take its life.

t_ch: 事关科员或有古怪…
t_en: There's something fishy about this researcher thing...

t_ch: 嗯…从怪物手中回收科员的所有物，也是防卫科应尽的职责。
t_en: Um hum... Recovering researchers' belongings falls within the Security Department's purview.

t_ch: 收拾怪物？让我来！
t_en: Beating up monsters? Leave it to me!

t_ch: 嗯… 清除空间站内的「军团」余孽，也是防卫科应尽的职责。
t_en: Um... Taking out the remnants of the Legion also falls within the Security Department's purview.

t_ch: 各退一步大家都好。
t_en: We can all take a step back.

t_ch: 嗯…不论是回收科员的所有物，还是清除「军团」余孽，都是防卫科应尽的职责。
t_en: Uh... Be it recovering researchers' belongings or taking out Legion remnants, they are both the Security Department's duties.

t_ch: 职责之外，还完成了呜呜伯的请托，不失为一举两得之策。
t_en: Apart from our duties, we can also help with Wubbaboos' request at the same time, which is like killing two birds with one stone.

t_ch: 这事，就交给我和{NICKNAME}好了。
t_en: Just leave this to {NICKNAME} and me.

t_ch: 呜！
t_en: Woo!

t_ch: 它说，那么合作愉快！它的同伴已经在现场伺机而动，希望能让你们尽快夺回「荣仓终」的所有物。
t_en: It says, "Happy collaborating! My comrades are already present at the scene, just waiting to strike. Hopefully, you will be able to recover Eikura Shuu's belongings as soon as possible."

t_ch: 等你们的好消息喔。
t_en: I'm waiting for your good news.

t_ch: 呜。
t_en: Woo.

t_ch: 你们回来啦。
t_en: You're back.

t_ch: 总共找到了三件东西。
t_en: We found three items.

t_ch: 嗯！它一眼就看出来你们把东西找齐啦。小家伙很佩服，毕竟怪物很难缠。
t_en: Uh huh! With just one glance, it already knew you had all the things. The little buddy is very impressed. After all, monsters can be quite a challenge to defeat sometimes.

t_ch: 一路战斗打得很痛快。
t_en: That was a pretty satisfying fight.

t_ch: 不愧是你，轻松解决怪物，还把呜呜伯要的东西都带回来了。
t_en: As expected of you, neither defeating the monster nor finding what Wubbaboos want seemed difficult to you.

t_ch: 看到了它的巨大同类…
t_en: We saw its huge brethren...

t_ch: 啊，你们已经见过它们之中最「可怖」的那一个了吗？看来之后不好忽悠了呀——好在你们已经把需要的东西都找齐了。
t_en: Ahh, you've already seen the Scariest of Them All? Looks like it's gonna be harder to bluff you in the future... Fortunately, you've already gotten all the things they need.

t_ch: 有一点我很好奇，呜呜伯为什么要搜集荣仓终科员的所有物？
t_en: I'm curious. Why do the Wubbaboos want Researcher Eikura Shuu's belongings?

t_ch: 不知道，之前小家伙拜托我的时候我也问过，但它总是闭口不谈。
t_en: I don't know. I asked the little buddy before, but it never answered.

t_ch: 按照呜呜伯的习性，或许这位荣仓终得罪了它们，它们才偷盗他的物品以施惩戒吧？
t_en: According to Wubbaboo's habits, maybe this Eikura Shuu offended them in some way, so they are taking revenge by confiscating his things?

t_ch: 荣仓终这个名字，我好像有点印象……
t_en: The name, Eikura Shuu... it feels somehow familiar...

t_ch: 是报告照片诡影的科员？
t_en: Is he the one who reported the specter photos?

t_ch: 不，我确信防卫科不曾登记过这样一位科员。
t_en: No, I'm very sure there isn't a staff member with that name in the Security Department.

t_ch: 是负责防护网的科员？
t_en: The one who's handling the Protection Net?

t_ch: 为什么这么说？难道你掌握着我们不知道的信息？看来平时是我疏忽了。
t_en: What makes you say that? Do you have information that's not available to us?

t_ch: 是呜呜伯的研究员？
t_en: The Wubbaboo researcher?

t_ch: 为什么这么说？难道你已经看过这几份资料？看来一路上是我疏忽了。
t_en: What makes you say that? Have you already seen these documents about him? I guess I missed it out somewhere along the way.

t_ch: 不知道，东西里或许有线索。
t_en: I don't know. There might be some clues among the items.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}说得对，在把东西交给你们之前，我们可以先看看吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME} is right. Before handing them over to you, may we go through the items first?

t_ch: 拿到这么重要的证物，是得好好亲自查证……
t_en: We ought to have a thorough check after getting our hands on such important evidence...

t_ch: 嗯，我都一一读过了，根据手上有的荣仓终家书、日记，以及研究报告……
t_en: Okay, I read through them. According to his letter back home, his diary, and his research report that we have on hand...

t_ch: 他是一位权级低下的界种科员，也是呜呜伯曾经的研究员兼照拂者。
t_en: He's just an Ecology researcher with low access clearance, and he once served as a Wubbaboo researcher and caretaker.

t_ch: 后来，由于研究失利，被调去负责空间站「反重力防护网」的日常检修和电离平衡维护。
t_en: At some point, his research fell through, and he was transferred to handle the space station's Anti-Gravity Protection Net's daily repairs and ionization balance maintenance.

t_ch: 来到空间站前，他曾是母星万中无一的天才。而在这里，却获得了极低的定分评价，过着无人问津的寂寞生活。
t_en: Before arriving at the space station, he was a one-in-a-million genius on his home planet. But here, his evaluation was extremely low, making his life here a lonely, uninteresting one.

t_ch: 从日记可以看出，他的心绪并不如意。但寄回的家书上，他母亲又对他寄望颇高。
t_en: From his diary, we understand that he felt unfulfilled. But in his letters back home, his mother seems to have high hopes for him.

t_ch: 看来他习惯报喜不报忧。
t_en: Looks like he has a habit of reporting good news only.

t_ch: 我也这么认为…在外的游子，多数是抱着这样的心态，不愿远在天外的父母平添担忧。
t_en: I agree... Most people who left their homes carry that mindset because they don't want to worry their parents.

t_ch: 他谎称自己在塔内受到了黑塔大人的认同，又受到上级研究员的厚待，目的也只是为了让母亲宽心吧。
t_en: He lied about his status and claimed that Madam Herta gave him high praise and that he was very appreciated by his seniors, all to make his mother proud.

t_ch: 或许不如意只是一时的。
t_en: Maybe his misfortune is only temporary.

t_ch: 也许吧。毕竟他写就日记已经是「军团」入侵之前的事情。
t_en: Maybe. After all, his diary only records events from before the Legion's invasion.

t_ch: 后来，「防护网」破毁、呜呜伯出逃，曾经的两大研究课题陷入停滞……
t_en: When the Protection Net was destroyed, the Wubbaboos escaped, and the two major research projects were halted...

t_ch: 也许他已经改换课题，重振旗鼓。
t_en: Maybe he had already changed his research interests and gained a renewed passion.

t_ch: 围城内外总是互相羡慕。
t_en: The grass is always greener on the other side.

t_ch: 嗯。外人看到的都是空间站的光鲜，却不知道身处其中的疲累。
t_en: Yeah. Other people see the glory of being employed by the space station, but they don't know the exhaustion people have to endure while on the inside.

t_ch: 这里的科员总在自我鞭策，就像永不止息的陀螺——希望得到黑塔大人的认同，甚至…博识尊的注视。
t_en: The researchers here are always highly motivated, working themselves like an ever-spinning top, trying so hard just to earn recognition from Madam Herta, or maybe even... a sidelong glance from Nous the Erudition.

t_ch: 但实现这一切又谈何容易？学会接受这其中的期望落差，也是空间站科员的必修一课。
t_en: But to achieve all that wouldn't be easy at all. Learning to accept the disparity between expectations and reality is a lesson that everyone here will eventually learn.

t_ch: 原来呜呜伯要我找的东西，属于这样一位科员。真难理解…毕竟我阿德勒是不会有研究失利这种烦恼的。
t_en: So, the belongings that the Wubbaboo wanted me to find belonged to such a researcher. How... unrelatable. After all, I, Adler, have never faced a dilemma such as unsuccessful research.

t_ch: 呜！
t_en: Woo!

t_ch: 它刚刚说，看够了没！看够了就快把东西交给它。
t_en: It just said, "Haven't you looked enough? Pass the items to me, now."

t_ch: 既然你们现在已经证明了是自己人，它就勉为其难把据点位置告诉你们——就在嘘实埋间的终点。
t_en: Seeing how you have proven yourselves to be on its side, it now acquiesces in pointing you toward their base of operation, which is at the end of the disposal site.

t_ch: 记住，除了你们不可再有第三人出现。
t_en: Remember, only you two are allowed to go there.

t_ch: 你看！高处那是…超巨型呜呜伯的身影。
t_en: Look! That thing over there is... the giant Wubbaboo's form.

t_ch: 据点位置无误，我们尽快赶过去，务必要弄清它们在此处集会的原因。
t_en: The location of the base is correct. We should get there immediately and find out the reason why they are gathering here.

t_ch: 这么多的呜呜伯…它们好像围着一个东西。
t_en: So many Wubbaboos... They seem to be gathered around something.

t_ch: 我们过去看看吧。
t_en: Let's have a look.

t_ch: 原来，是这么一回事……
t_en: So, this is what it is...

t_ch: 所以是怎么一回事？
t_en: So, what exactly happened?

t_ch: 你还记得那篇《呜呜伯行为考》么？
t_en: Do you still remember what was written in the Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior?

t_ch: 难为它们一片苦心。
t_en: They put a lot of effort into this.

t_ch: 是啊。你还记得那篇《呜呜伯行为考》么？
t_en: That's right. Do you still remember what was written in the Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior?

t_ch: 这么多赶紧抓回去！
t_en: There are so many of them. Let's capture them all!

t_ch: 稍安勿躁，{NICKNAME}。你还记得那篇《呜呜伯行为考》么？
t_en: Be patient, {NICKNAME}. Do you still remember what was written in the Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior?

t_ch: 什么样的…呜呜伯将「聚集于冷僻无人的房间」？
t_en: What kind of Wubbaboo would... "gather in an empty room"?

t_ch: 快乐的…
t_en: Happy...

t_ch: 悲伤的…
t_en: Sad...

t_ch: 愤怒的…
t_en: Angry...

t_ch: 平静的…
t_en: Calm...

t_ch: 「悲伤的呜呜伯将聚集于冷僻无人的房间，共享彼此的哀思。」
t_en: "Sad Wubbaboos will gather in an empty room and share their unhappy thoughts."

t_ch: 不仅如此，在这座房间内，在它们所守卫的这座纪念碑之上，镌刻着「荣仓终」这个名字。刻痕很新，是不久前才手造的。
t_en: Not only that. The name Eikura Shuu is carved on the memorial stone they are guarding in this room. The carving looks new. It must have been built recently.

t_ch: 这些呜呜伯收集的相关所有物，不是为了戏弄它们的前任研究员，也不是为了破坏空间站的研究秩序……
t_en: These Wubbaboos were gathering his belongings not to prank their previous caretaker, and not to destroy order on the space station...

t_ch: 而是为了——祭奠已经亡去的故人。
t_en: They were... mourning a late friend.

t_ch: 看来这位名叫荣仓终的科员，已经在「军团」的入侵中罹难了…难怪不论是我还是阿德勒，都对这个名字没有任何印象。
t_en: Looks like this researcher named Eikura Shuu perished during the Legion's invasion... No wonder neither Adler nor I seem to be able to recall the name.

t_ch: 没想到看似凶恶、没心没肺的银河星灵呜呜伯，竟然比空间站的人类更加珍重幽微的情感。
t_en: I didn't think Wubbaboos, the seemingly feral and heartless astral spirits, would cherish friendship more so than the humans do on the space station.

t_ch: 我看小家伙也没有很凶嘛。
t_en: Well, these little guys don't seem to be that feral.

t_ch: 嗯，你说得对。它们不仅不凶，甚至还有点可爱。
t_en: Yes, you're right. They are indeed not feral. Come to think of it, they even seem a bit cute.

t_ch: 谁说人类就不珍重情感了？
t_en: Who says humans don't cherish friendship?

t_ch: 嗯，你说得对，是我以偏概全了……
t_en: Hmm, you're right, I shouldn't overgeneralize like this...

t_ch: 这一幕也提醒了我，该在空间站内增设类似的纪念碑，向那些命丧于怪物铁蹄之下的科员们，致上属于「黑塔」的哀思。
t_en: ...which reminds me, we should set up a similar type of memorial site for those who lost their lives under the stampede of the Antimatter Legion, so as to offer condolences on behalf of the station.

t_ch: 至于荣仓终的纪念碑，就让它永远屹立在此处吧——所有物集齐，纪念碑落定，祭奠也已礼成，呜呜伯们可以放心了。
t_en: As for Eikura Shuu's memorial stone, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to have it stand here for eternity. With belongings gathered and the memorial stone secured, the ceremony is now complete. The Wubbaboos can now be appeased.

t_ch: 只是…它们为什么还没有离开的意思呢？
t_en: But... why does it seem that they still have no intention to leave?

t_ch: 直接抓回去算了。
t_en: Let's just capture them and bring them back.

t_ch: 这么做未免也太粗暴了。让我想想…嗯，有了。
t_en: That's a bit too heavy-handed. Lemme think... Oh, I've got an idea.

t_ch: 或许还差点什么？
t_en: Maybe there's still something missing?

t_ch: 差点什么？让我想想…嗯，有了。
t_en: What's missing? Lemme think... Oh, I've got it.

t_ch: 不如放任它们惜别。
t_en: Why don't we just let them be?

t_ch: 时间拖得再久，无非也是沉溺在伤感中。让我想想…嗯，有了。
t_en: Shying away from this simply won't do any good to lessen their sorrow. Lemme think... Oh, I've got an idea.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你会拍照么？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, do you know how to take a picture?

t_ch: 呜呜伯们于纪念碑前齐聚的影像、超巨型呜呜伯一夫当关的影像、三两呜呜伯共享哀思的影像……
t_en: A picture of Wubbaboos gathering in front of the memorial, a picture of the giant Wubbaboo guarding the place by itself, and a picture of a couple of Wubbaboos sharing their grief...

t_ch: 凡此种种，我希望你能将它们拍照定格、留存于此。
t_en: I hope you can take a few pictures that would fit these descriptions, so we can memorialize them.

t_ch: 情谊永久封存，使之坚韧绵长…我想唯有做到这种程度，这些呜呜伯才会真正释怀。
t_en: Eternalizing their friendship to make it resilient and enduring... is what I think will truly leave Wubbaboos at peace.

t_ch: 要是有了可以永久留存的照片，呜呜伯们或许就能了却一桩心愿吧。
t_en: If we have pictures that we can keep forever, maybe the Wubbaboos can finally fulfill their wish.

t_ch: 照片都拍好了。
t_en: The pictures are all done.

t_ch: 辛苦…没想到，打从一开始，这些被错认为「诡影」的小家伙，也会如此温情的一面。
t_en: Thank you so much... I didn't expect these little things, which were often mistaken for specters, to have a soft side.

t_ch: 看到这些照片，它们也该离开了。既然一切因为这个共同目标而起，那么目标完成，想必它们也会继续过着与科员们相安无事的生活。
t_en: Looking at these pictures, I think it's time they leave. It all began with this collective goal of theirs. And now that it is finally realized, they should be able to continue living in peaceful coexistence with the staff members.

t_ch: 不过，最后还有一件事。
t_en: But, there is still one last thing.

t_ch: 作为这一切的见证者，有个小礼物要给你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: This is a small token of appreciation for being such a kind witness to all of this, {NICKNAME}. Please take it.

t_ch: 阿德勒说，呜呜伯用它们族群的特殊手段，为你送上了一份特别的「祝福」。
t_en: Adler said that the Wubbaboos prepared a unique blessing just for you, using the special technique of their species.

t_ch: 从现在开始，你就是极少数能听懂它们在说什么的幸运儿了。
t_en: From now on, you will be one of the very few who can understand them.

t_ch: 真是神奇的族群。
t_en: They are indeed a species full of wonders.

t_ch: 嗯，空间站是它们最好的归宿。
t_en: Um hum, the space station should be the best place for them.

t_ch: 它们该不会是话痨吧？
t_en: They are not a bunch of nags, are they?

t_ch: …这我就不知道了，不过我看阿德勒和它们聊得挺愉快。
t_en: ...I can't say, but from what I can see, Adler seems to enjoy having conversations with them just fine.

t_ch: 活着的人…还有呜呜伯，我们的生活总归要继续。
t_en: As for the humans... and the Wubbaboos, all our lives have to go on.

t_ch: 不过，今后你或许能多来和呜呜伯聊聊…就当是这场相遇的某种纪念吧。
t_en: However, perhaps in the future, you can drop by more often to have a chat with them... Think of it as a commemoration of this encounter.

t_ch: 科员荣仓终的纪念碑，上面记载着他的生平，表面隐隐有水迹，像是谁的泪痕。
t_en: Researcher Eikura Shuu's monument, which displays a summary of his life, seems to have faint traces of water on its surface. Perhaps those were the tears left by someone in mourning.

t_ch: 嗯，可能会经过的舱室都已经检查过了，记得向艾丝妲站长汇报一下……
t_en: Correct. All the cabins they might pass by have been checked. Remember to report to Lead Researcher Asta.

t_ch: 你好…
t_en: Hello...

t_ch: 打扰了…
t_en: Excuse me...

t_ch: 我来咯！
t_en: I'm here!

t_ch: 非基座舱段的问题稍后再处理…啊，原来是{NICKNAME}啊。
t_en: We'll deal with problems outside the base zone later... Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 很忙的样子啊。
t_en: You look busy.

t_ch: 没想到吧。
t_en: Are you surprised?

t_ch: 不是你叫我来的吗？
t_en: Didn't you ask me to come?

t_ch: 抱歉，让你看见窘态了…突然有些事要处理，本想在你来之前解决的，结果一直忙到现在。
t_en: Sorry, this is embarrassing... We suddenly had some stuff come up. I wanted to take care of it before you arrived, but I can't seem to get a break around here.

t_ch: 不谈论这个了。给——送给你，是我早上做的，一直放在保温舱里。
t_en: Never mind about that. Here — this is for you. I made it this morning. And I've been keeping it warm.

t_ch: 是阿兰做的炒饭。
t_en: You made me some fried rice!

t_ch: 只是一点心意。
t_en: It's just a little something I whipped up.

t_ch: 礼物就是这个吧。
t_en: A gift?

t_ch: 嗯，希望你不会嫌弃。
t_en: That's right! I hope you don't hate it.

t_ch: 艾丝妲也有一份吧？
t_en: Did you save any for Asta?

t_ch: 不不，她今早吃的是布丁。这是特地为你做的。
t_en: No, she had pudding this morning. I made it especially for you.

t_ch: 我犹豫了很久要送什么，思来想去，还是觉得自己擅长的才最合适。小姐很爱吃这个，希望你也能喜欢。
t_en: I spent a long time wondering what to give you... In the end, I realized I should stick to what I'm good at. Miss Asta loves my fried rice, so I hope you like it too.

t_ch: 不好意思啊，附近这么嘈杂，也不够正式。原本是想找个安静的环境，再听听你的评价的……
t_en: Sorry, it's so noisy here... I wanted to find somewhere quieter where I could get your feedback, but...

t_ch: 没关系。
t_en: That's alright.

t_ch: 嗯，这道菜我还挺自信的，可惜最后还是有些仓促……
t_en: Mm, I'm pretty confident in this dish. Unfortunately, I was a bit rushed at the end...

t_ch: 这么正式啊。
t_en: Don't worry about it.

t_ch: 艾丝妲小姐说，道谢一定要真诚…可惜最后还是这么仓促……
t_en: Miss Asta said that gratitude has to be sincere... It's a shame that I had to finish it up so hastily...

t_ch: 今天，有位大人物突然提出要拜访空间站。因为是突然通知，大家都有些匆忙，担心招待不周，有损黑塔女士的形象。
t_en: Some big shot suddenly decided to visit the space station today. Everyone has been in a hurry since the announcement. They're all worried that a bad impression could damage Madam Herta's reputation.

t_ch: 听艾丝妲小姐说，这位客人似乎是黑塔女士的学术伙伴，能和她往来，那一定是银河中响当当的人物了……
t_en: Miss Asta said that the guest appears to be Madam Herta's research partner. If he's doing research with her, he must be famous throughout the galaxy...

t_ch: 啊，算算时间，客人差不多要到了。你要是感兴趣，就跟着大部队一块儿去看看吧，我和小姐随后就到——
t_en: Ah, look at the time. The guest is almost here. If you're curious, just follow the crowd. Miss Asta and I will be there soon...

t_ch: 嘘——准备好。
t_en: Hush— Get ready.

t_ch: 假设：思想总是先于语言。
t_en: Hypothesis: Thought always precedes word...

t_ch: 则没有词句能定义这份喜悦。
t_en: ...and yet I can't find the words for this moment.

t_ch: 很高兴见到你，艾丝妲。
t_en: It's good to see you, Asta.

t_ch: 抱歉，比约定时间早了4分<unbreak>13</unbreak>秒，希望不会给你造成困扰。
t_en: I apologize. I'm 4 minutes and <unbreak>13</unbreak> seconds earlier than the appointed time. I hope it's not a bother.

t_ch: 怎么会呢，螺丝咕姆先生，欢迎您造访黑塔空间站。
t_en: Of course not, Mr. Screwllum. Welcome to Herta Space Station.

t_ch: 不必如此拘谨，艾丝妲，用「你」就好。「黑塔」是知识汇聚的地方，在这里，我们赞美思想的平等。
t_en: No need for formalities, Asta. Herta Space Station is where knowledge converges. Here, we celebrate the equality of thought.

t_ch: 有机生命的协作，奇妙、高效——你们重建空间站的速度远远超出我的推演。
t_en: Such collaboration between organic lifeforms is magnificent and efficient — you're rebuilding the space station far quicker than I could have imagined.

t_ch: 谢谢你的肯定，螺丝咕姆先生，需要我带你四处参观一下吗？上次峰会过后，我们新开展了几个基于硅基矩阵的研究项目。
t_en: We appreciate your high praise, Mr. Screwllum. Would you like me to show you around? Since the last summit, we've launched several new research projects focused on silicon-based matrices.

t_ch: 情感上，我欣然接受。但毕竟和黑塔有约在先，还是请这些惊喜稍等片刻吧。
t_en: That sounds lovely. But I do have a meeting with Herta, so let's put the new surprises on hold for now.

t_ch: 黑塔女士应该在自己的办公室里，请走这边，我为你带路。
t_en: Madam Herta should be in her office. I'll take you there. Right this way.

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 这位是……
t_en: And you are...

t_ch: 你好，我叫{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Hi, I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哦！你好，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。久闻大名，你可是黑塔最近常挂在嘴边的人。
t_en: Ah! Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've heard so much about you. Herta talks about you often.

t_ch: 你好，螺丝咕姆先生。
t_en: Hello, Mr. Screwllum.

t_ch: 你好，{F#女士}{M#先生}，想必你就是黑塔最近常挂在嘴边的人。
t_en: Ah! Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've heard so much about you. Herta talks about you often.

t_ch: 嘿，你猜？
t_en: Hehe, can you guess?
Hey...

t_ch: 哈哈，如此出人意料的反应，想必你就是黑塔最近常挂在嘴边的人。
t_en: Haha, judging by this fellow's surprised reaction, you must be the one Herta is always talking about.

t_ch: 她对你充满好奇，我也一样。与星核共生是种怎样的感受？希望之后能有足够的时间让我们了解彼此，和这个问题的答案。
t_en: She's quite curious about you, as am I. What is it like to live in symbiosis with a Stellaron? I hope we'll have sufficient time in the future to get to know each other and answer this question.

t_ch: 抱歉…本来还想带你四处逛逛的，这下怕是抽不开身了……
t_en: Sorry... I wanted to show you around, but now I don't think I'll be able to get away...

t_ch: 没关系。
t_en: That's alright.

t_ch: 快去吧，要跟不上了。
t_en: Go ahead, or you won't be able to catch up.

t_ch: 嗯，那我先走了。
t_en: Alright, see you later.

t_ch: 奇怪，应该就在这附近啊，该不会是藏在黑塔女士的画像里吧……
t_en: Strange... it should be around here somewhere. Maybe it's hidden inside Madam Herta's portrait...

t_ch: 嗯？有什么事吗，找前台的话，出门笔直走就是……
t_en: Huh? Do you need something? If you're looking for the front desk, just go straight through those doors...

t_ch: 你在做什么？
t_en: What are you doing?

t_ch: 等等，我认识你，刚才见你一直在和阿兰队长聊天，你一定就是那位备受黑塔女士瞩目的新星。
t_en: Wait a second. I know you! I saw you chatting with Captain Arlan just now. You must be the rising star who caught Madam Herta's attention.

t_ch: 遇到麻烦了？
t_en: Are you having trouble with something?

t_ch: 等等，听这个事事关心、有求必应的语气，你一定就是最近那位，空间站大名鼎鼎的热心肠！
t_en: ...Such a concerned and responsive tone... You must be the one everyone's been talking about recently! Your kindheartedness is famous throughout the space station!

t_ch: 她真好看。
t_en: Aaah... She looks so pretty.

t_ch: 哦，黑塔女士的又一个粉丝？行吧，你随意欣赏，只不过这幅画像很快就要被收起来了。
t_en: Oh, another fan of Madam Herta's? Well, I'm afraid this portrait's being taken down soon.

t_ch: 先做个自我介绍。我叫伦纳德，是这座空间站的网络安全工程师。
t_en: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm Leonard, a cybersecurity engineer here at the space station.

t_ch: 你应该知道吧？前不久，这里遭到了「反物质军团」的袭击，在那场骚乱中，各舱段的主控系统也瘫痪了。
t_en: You probably know that this place was recently attacked by the Antimatter Legion. In the chaos, the master control system for each zone was paralyzed.

t_ch: 现在空间站正在进行灾后重建，我的职责就是协助修复各种设备，恢复空间站的网络安全。
t_en: Now that the station is being rebuilt, my job is to repair equipment and restore the space station's cybersecurity.

t_ch: 不过在修复过程中，我却发现了一些异常——访问记录显示，在主控系统瘫痪的那段时间，有「军团」以外的第三者入侵了这里。
t_en: But during the repair process, I discovered some anomalies. The access records show that a third party other than the Legion invaded while the master control system was paralyzed.

t_ch: 是个戴墨镜的女人？
t_en: Was it a lady in sunglasses?

t_ch: 我不清楚对方的长相——确切地说，我正要调查此事呢。
t_en: I don't know who or what it was. Actually, I'm investigating that right now.

t_ch: 是星核猎手？
t_en: Stellaron Hunters?

t_ch: 嗯，有人看法和你一致。
t_en: Mmm, some others have surmised the same as you.

t_ch: 是星穹列车？
t_en: The Astral Express?

t_ch: 不是，他们到得要更早些。
t_en: No, they arrived earlier.

t_ch: 我们怀疑来者是「星核猎手」。这群人神出鬼没，危险得很，个个在「公司」通缉中榜上有名。
t_en: We suspect that it may have been the Stellaron Hunters. It's an elusive group, and very dangerous. Every member is on the IPC's wanted list.

t_ch: 其中还有个来自朋克洛德的超级骇客，说来惭愧，我已经在她那儿吃过一次亏了——
t_en: They include a super hacker from Punklorde. I'm ashamed to admit that I've lost to her once before...

t_ch: 前阵子，我在筛查过程中发现了她的行踪，本打算顺藤摸瓜找出对方的底细，却被反将一军，中了她的陷阱。
t_en: A while ago, I discovered her whereabouts during a screening process. I was planning to follow the clues to find more details about her, but I fell into her trap.

t_ch: 你猜后来发生了什么？她反向骇入我的设备，给一堆人发了垃圾短信，整了个面向全空间站的游戏，告诉所有人有个叫伦纳德的呆瓜闯了大祸……
t_en: Can you guess what happened next? She reverse-hacked my device, sent out a bunch of spam, made a video game open to the space station, and told everyone that an idiot named Leonard made a big, silly mistake...

t_ch: 唉，还是不提了。现在事情已经平息，我本以为自己会被追责，但黑塔女士大人有大量，竟然允许我继续调查这件事，真是不幸中的万幸。
t_en: Ugh, I don't want to think about it. Now that everything has calmed down, I thought they'd be on my case already. The silver lining? Madam Herta was generous enough to allow me to continue investigating this matter.

t_ch: 恭喜啊。
t_en: Congratulations.

t_ch: 嗯，我也没想到。空间站的事务通常都是艾丝妲站长在打理，我还是第一次见黑塔女士亲自下指令。
t_en: Yeah, it was pretty unexpected. Space station affairs are usually handled by Lead Researcher Asta — this is the first time I've seen Madam Herta give the orders in person.

t_ch: 是不想管吧。
t_en: Normally she doesn't want to deal with it.

t_ch: 所以才说是不幸中的万幸呀……黑塔女士的作风你也知道，她要真对什么东西感兴趣，就没别人什么事儿了。
t_en: Hence my "silver lining..." You know Madam Herta — if she's really interested in something, it doesn't matter what anyone else says.

t_ch: 是在给你穿小鞋吧。
t_en: She's getting revenge on you.

t_ch: 没、没这么夸张吧…我算什么东西，还轮得到黑塔女士来惦记？
t_en: I—I wouldn't go that far... I'm just a nobody. You think Madam Herta would remember me?

t_ch: 总之，领导都给机会了，我怎能不珍惜？要是能将功补过，好好表现一番，我说不定还有扭转风评的机会。
t_en: To put it simply, the leaders have given me an opportunity. How could I not cherish it? If I can make up for my mistakes and do a good job, I may have a chance to prove myself.

t_ch: 哦，说了这么多，还没跟你解释我在这儿做什么——刚才也提到，我正在继续调查这件事。
t_en: Oh, I haven't properly explained to you what I'm doing here... As I mentioned, I'm investigating this situation.

t_ch: 这次我打算从空间站内部入手，看看能不能找到一些线索，还原入侵者当时的行动路线，说不定就能发现之前错过的盲区。
t_en: This time, I plan to start from inside the space station and see if I can find some clues to trace the intruders' steps. Maybe I can find the blind spot I missed before.

t_ch: 我设计了一种解码程序，看——虽然长得像个相机，但这其实是个探测仪。透过它，我们就能看到一些被隐藏起来的痕迹。
t_en: I designed a decoding program. Look — it looks like a camera, but it's actually a detector. We should be able to find hidden clues with it.

t_ch: 就像…这样！
t_en: Just like... this!
